master_general_agent_id.description: MGA scope — required for all schedules

master_group_id.description: Broker/Agency scope — optional; null for MGA-level schedules

tenant_id.description: Tenant scope — optional for multi-tenant isolation

schedule_type.description: Schedule type (one_time for Gate 6I-A; recurring reserved for 6I-B)

frequency.description: Reserved for Gate 6I-B (recurring patterns); null for Gate 6I-A one_time

scheduled_date_time.description: When the report should run (one_time) or first run (recurring)

recurrence_end_date.description: For recurring schedules; null = no end date. Null for one_time (Gate 6I-A)

next_run_at.description: Calculated next run timestamp (same as scheduled_date_time for one_time)

last_run_at.description: Timestamp of last execution (null until first run)

owner_user_id.description: Optional user ID of owner; null = shared by MGA admin
